extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD defended POGAČAR's late attack on the 20%+ final kilometer in Peyragudes, limiting losses to 4 seconds with bonuses after MCNULTY paced the final climbs
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT clinched green jersey mathematically mid-stage via intermediate sprint, potentially freeing team watts for yellow defense thereafter
MCNULTY paced final two climbs for POGAČAR at 24 years old, revealing UAE's domestique depth when MAJKA unavailable
POGAČAR delayed attack until 300m on 20%+ gradient, suggesting UAE believed only extreme gradient could crack VINGEGAARD
VINGEGAARD chose not to counter-attack despite feeling strong, prioritizing risk management over time gains with 2:18 lead

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Matched POGAČAR's attack on extreme gradient without teammates, then warmed down on bike suggesting recovery confidence before final TT
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: Won stage but only gained 4 seconds after bonuses despite MAJKA DNS and teammate setting ferocious final climb pace
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: Set ferocious pace on final two climbs for POGAČAR at 24, earned most aggressive rider, showing UAE developmental domestique strength
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Secured green jersey mathematically at intermediate sprint while still performing yellow jersey support duties
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Lost time in GC fight, dropped over two minutes on final climb while third place overall gap deteriorated
rider_signals.HOULE Hugo: positive: Attacked early with GILBERT after teammate won previous stage, showing aggressive Canada team morale pattern
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: neutral: Led mountain classification but faced pressure from MEINTJES and CICCONE rising in top five
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: Positioned at front early on Col d'Aspin with LUTSENKO, showing remaining climbing ambition despite GC irrelevance
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Positioned himself at front entering Col d'Aspin, suggesting continued effort despite non-competitive GC position
